label: Call LLM
description: Send a prompt (with {{variables}} from the row) to the LLM backend from Settings (default: local LaMini) or override per step (LaMini / OpenAI / Claude / Gemini / Grok). Optional per-step model fields. Response types: true/false, plain text, or text with feedback. LaMini uses your project folder (~820MB) or scripts/download-lamini-model.sh.

defaultAction.prompt:
Based on the following, answer the question.

Content:
{{content}}

Question: Is this appropriate for our audience?

formSchema.label: Run only if (variable or {{key}}; skip when empty/falsy)
Backend override (optional; empty = Settings workflow default)
Claude / Gemini / Grok model id (this step only; optional)
